_comment: Recommended hooks configuration for AgentOne TokenOptimizer by Iterate.ai. Merge into your ~/.claude/settings.json or .claude/settings.json. Commands point at the SELF-CONTAINED dist/ bundles (library inlined by the build) so the runtime never depends on a vendored library that can go stale. Paths assume install placed the plugin at ~/.claude/plugins/agentone-token-compression/. Set TOKEN_OPTIMIZER_DISABLED=1 to bypass all hooks without uninstalling.
